channel.title: Tax Batao Blog
channel.description: Latest articles and guides from Tax Batao

item.title: Income Tax Calculator 2026-27
item.description: Free Income Tax Calculator for FY 2025-26 (AY 2026-27). Calculate tax with old & new regimes, deductions (80C, 80D), and get instant results.

item.title: Income Tax on ₹10 Lakh Salary (2025-26)
item.description: Income tax on ₹10 lakh salary. Old regime: ₹78,000. New regime: ₹33,800.

item.title: Income Tax on ₹100 Lakh Salary (2025-26)
item.description: Income tax on ₹100 lakh salary. Old regime: ₹28,60,000. New regime: ₹26,80,600.

item.title: ITR Filing Guide for Salaried Employees 2026 - Step-by-Step - Tax Batao
item.description: Complete ITR filing guide for salaried employees FY 2025-26. Learn tax slabs, deductions, old vs new regime, and file ITR-1 with our calculator.

item.title: New vs Old Tax Regime Calculator 2026 - Free Tool & Guide - Tax Batao
item.description: Compare new vs old tax regime for FY 2025-26 with our free calculator. Calculate your tax savings, understand 80C benefits, and choose the right regime.
